Container.Name: Yuvomi
Container.Overview:
Yuvomi is a private, self-hosted family planner — one calm home for everything your household needs to stay organized. No cloud accounts, no subscriptions, no tracking: your data lives on your server and nowhere else.
Independent modules — turn on what fits, ignore the rest:
- Dashboard — today's tasks, events, meals and reminders at a glance - Tasks — shared to-dos with priorities, due dates and assignees - Shopping — collaborative grocery lists, auto-sorted by category - Meals & Recipes — weekly meal planner with a built-in recipe book - Calendar — family calendar with recurring events and reminders - Budget — shared expenses, split costs and a spending overview - Housekeeping — chores, supplies and staff/session tracking - Documents — store and find important household files - Notes, Contacts & Birthdays — everything else in one tidy place
Why Yuvomi:
- Mobile-first PWA — install it on any phone, works offline - Light & dark mode, fast and polished (no bloated frameworks, no build step) - Optional sync — CalDAV / CardDAV, Apple and Google Calendar - OIDC single sign-on for households that already run an identity provider - Encrypted-at-rest storage (SQLCipher) with automated, scheduled backups - Multi-language, fully self-contained and MIT-licensed
— Setup —
REQUIRED: Set a long random SESSION_SECRET. RECOMMENDED: Set a strong DB_ENCRYPTION_KEY to encrypt the database at rest — without it the database and any synced calendar/contact credentials are stored unencrypted. Generate either secret with: openssl rand -base64 48
After the container starts, open the WebUI — the first visit guides you through creating your admin account. (Headless setups can alternatively run node setup.js in the container console.) Then log in — pick the modules you want and invite your family.
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: family planner household organizer tasks groceries shopping meals recipes calendar budget chores notes contacts birthdays caldav carddav pwa selfhosted

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the Yuvomi web interface.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Database and stored app data (uploads, documents).

Config.Name: Backups
Config.Description: Destination folder for scheduled and manual database backups.

Config.Name: Modules (optional)
Config.Description: Optional: drop-in folder for additional Yuvomi modules. Leave default if unused.

Config.Name: SESSION_SECRET
Config.Description: REQUIRED. A long random string used to sign sessions. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 48

Config.Name: DB_ENCRYPTION_KEY
Config.Description: RECOMMENDED. Strong key to encrypt the database at rest (SQLCipher). Leave empty for unencrypted SQLite. Cannot be changed later without re-encrypting. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 48

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone, e.g. Europe/Berlin. Affects scheduled backups and reminders.

Config.Name: SESSION_SECURE
Config.Description: Set to true only when serving Yuvomi over HTTPS behind a reverse proxy. Keep false for direct HTTP access on the LAN.

Config.Name: TRUST_PROXY
Config.Description: Use 1 behind one reverse proxy (Caddy/nginx/Traefik), or 'loopback' for direct (no proxy) access.

Config.Name: DB_PATH
Config.Description: Path to the SQLite database inside the container. Keep default unless you know what you are doing.

Config.Name: WEATHER_LAT
Config.Description: Optional. Latitude for the Open-Meteo weather widget (no API key required). Find coordinates on openstreetmap.org or Google Maps, e.g. 52.52.

Config.Name: WEATHER_LON
Config.Description: Optional. Longitude for the Open-Meteo weather widget, e.g. 13.41.

Config.Name: WEATHER_CITY
Config.Description: Optional. Display name shown on the weather widget, e.g. Berlin.

Config.Name: WEATHER_UNITS
Config.Description: Optional. Unit system for temperatures: metric (°C) or imperial (°F).

Config.Name: OPENWEATHER_API_KEY
Config.Description: Optional (legacy). OpenWeatherMap API key to enable the weather widget. Prefer the keyless Open-Meteo variables above.

Config.Name: OPENWEATHER_CITY
Config.Description: Optional (legacy). City for the OpenWeatherMap weather widget, e.g. Berlin.

Config.Name: OPENWEATHER_UNITS
Config.Description: Optional (legacy). Unit system for temperatures: metric (°C) or imperial (°F).

Config.Name: OPENWEATHER_LANG
Config.Description: Optional (legacy). Language code for OpenWeatherMap descriptions, e.g. en, de, fr.

Config.Name: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID
Config.Description: Optional. Google OAuth 2.0 client ID for Google Calendar sync.

Config.Name: GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET
Config.Description: Optional. Google OAuth 2.0 client secret for Google Calendar sync.

Config.Name: GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI
Config.Description: Optional. OAuth callback URL, e.g. https://your-domain.com/api/v1/calendar/google/callback

Config.Name: OIDC_ISSUER
Config.Description: Optional. OIDC issuer URL, e.g. https://authentik.example.com/application/o/oikos/

Config.Name: OIDC_CLIENT_ID
Config.Description: Optional. OIDC client ID from your identity provider.

Config.Name: OIDC_CLIENT_SECRET
Config.Description: Optional. OIDC client secret from your identity provider.

Config.Name: OIDC_REDIRECT_URI
Config.Description: Optional. OIDC callback URL, e.g. https://your-domain.com/api/v1/auth/oidc/callback

Config.Name: OIDC_TRUST_EMAIL_WITHOUT_VERIFIED_CLAIM
Config.Description: Optional. Set to true to allow account linking when your IdP omits the email_verified claim. Only enable if your IdP fully controls email verification and never issues unverified addresses (e.g. older Authentik without an explicit email_verified mapping).

Config.Name: APPLE_CALDAV_URL
Config.Description: Optional. Apple CalDAV server URL (default: iCloud). Change only if using a custom CalDAV server.

Config.Name: APPLE_USERNAME
Config.Description: Optional. Apple ID (email) for iCloud Calendar sync.

Config.Name: APPLE_APP_SPECIFIC_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Optional. Apple app-specific password for iCloud Calendar sync (generate at appleid.apple.com).

Config.Name: SYNC_INTERVAL_MINUTES
Config.Description: Interval in minutes for calendar sync (Google, Apple, CalDAV). Default: 15.

Config.Name: BACKUP_ENABLED
Config.Description: Optional. Enable automated database backups (default: true).

Config.Name: BACKUP_SCHEDULE
Config.Description: Optional. Cron schedule for automated backups (default: 2 AM daily).

Config.Name: BACKUP_KEEP
Config.Description: Optional. Number of backups to retain (default: 7).

Config.Name: WEBDAV_BACKUP_ENABLED
Config.Description: Optional. Set to true to enable automatic upload of backups to a WebDAV server after each local backup.

Config.Name: WEBDAV_BACKUP_URL
Config.Description: Optional. WebDAV server URL, e.g. https://cloud.example.com/remote.php/dav/files/username/

Config.Name: WEBDAV_BACKUP_USERNAME
Config.Description: Optional. WebDAV username for authentication.

Config.Name: WEBDAV_BACKUP_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Optional. WebDAV password for authentication.

Config.Name: WEBDAV_BACKUP_PATH
Config.Description: Optional. Remote directory path where backup files are stored (default: /yuvomi/backups/).

Config.Name: WEBDAV_BACKUP_KEEP
Config.Description: Optional. Number of remote backup files to keep (default: 7).

Config.Name: DOCUMENT_STORAGE_WEBDAV_ENABLED
Config.Description: Optional. Store newly uploaded document files on WebDAV. Existing files are not migrated.

Config.Name: DOCUMENT_STORAGE_WEBDAV_URL
Config.Description: Optional. WebDAV server URL for document storage, e.g. https://cloud.example.com/remote.php/dav/files/username/

Config.Name: DOCUMENT_STORAGE_WEBDAV_USERNAME
Config.Description: Optional. WebDAV username for document storage.

Config.Name: DOCUMENT_STORAGE_WEBDAV_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Optional. WebDAV password for document storage.

Config.Name: DOCUMENT_STORAGE_WEBDAV_PATH
Config.Description: Optional. Remote base folder for document files (default: yuvomi-documents).

Config.Name: DOCUMENT_STORAGE_WEBDAV_ALLOW_PRIVATE_NETWORK
Config.Description: Optional. Set to true to allow WebDAV document storage on local/private network addresses (e.g. Nextcloud in the same Docker network). Only enable in controlled environments.

Config.Name: EMAIL_SMTP_HOST
Config.Description: Optional. SMTP server hostname for outgoing email (password-reset links).

Config.Name: EMAIL_SMTP_PORT
Config.Description: Optional. SMTP server port (default: 587).

Config.Name: EMAIL_SMTP_SECURE
Config.Description: Optional. SMTP connection security: ssl, starttls, or none (default: starttls).

Config.Name: EMAIL_SMTP_USER
Config.Description: Optional. SMTP authentication username.

Config.Name: EMAIL_SMTP_PASS
Config.Description: Optional. SMTP authentication password.

Config.Name: EMAIL_FROM_ADDRESS
Config.Description: Optional. Sender email address for outgoing mail, e.g. yuvomi@example.com.

Config.Name: EMAIL_FROM_NAME
Config.Description: Optional. Sender display name for outgoing mail (default: Yuvomi).

Config.Name: BASE_URL
Config.Description: Optional but required for password-reset emails to be sent. Absolute origin used to build reset links, e.g. https://yuvomi.example.com. The request Host header is never trusted as a fallback, to prevent reset-link poisoning.

Config.Name: FIXER_API_KEY
Config.Description: Optional. Fixer API key for live currency conversion in Budget → Subscriptions. Rates are cached for 12 hours; works without this key using the cached/manual rate.
